title: Robot girlfriends, recursive AI agents, full AI research, Happy Horse: AI NEWS
summary: This video newscast covers a wide range of recent AI developments including video editing (OmniShotCut, Vista4D), motion capture (Mocap Anything v2), language models (Ling2.6 Flash, Talkie, Grok 4.3, Mistral 3.5, Nemotron 3), and agentic systems (recursive multi-agents, ARA, Moonlake). Products like Happy Horse and robotics applications are also featured.
